message:
Running command: # ABC running for ~3 min. Log shows 22.3MB unchanged (buffered during ABC).
# ABC will take 20-60 min for this large design.
# Long wait: check every 15 min for up to 8 hours.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 64); do
  sleep 900  # 15 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  ABC=$(pgrep -f "yosys-abc" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$NL" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) ABC=${ABC:-done}"
  [ $NL_BYTES -gt 0 ] && echo "  NETLIST: $(numfmt --to=iec $NL_BYTES 2>/dev/null) bytes"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    echo ""
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

{"command": "# ABC running for ~3 min. Log shows 22.3MB unchanged (buffered during ABC).
# ABC will take 20-60 min for this large design.
# Long wait: check every 15 min for up to 8 hours.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 64); do

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  ABC=$(pgrep -f "yosys-abc" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$NL" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) ABC=${ABC:-done}"
  [ $NL_BYTES -gt 0 ] && echo "  NETLIST: $(numfmt --to=iec $NL_BYTES 2>/dev/null) bytes"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    echo ""
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:

# ABC will take 20-60 min for this large design.
# Long wait: check every 15 min for up to 8 hours.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  ABC=$(pgrep -f "yosys-abc" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$NL" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

  [ $NL_BYTES -gt 0 ] && echo "  NETLIST: $(numfmt --to=iec $NL_BYTES 2>/dev/null) bytes"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    echo ""
    tail -80 "$LOG"

  fi
